_note: Shared registry catalogue — the ONE curated source read by both the Node corpus-capture script (scripts/gen-bench-corpus.sh) and the Haskell Ecluse.Test.RegistryCapture. NOT an npm project, NOT installed, and NOT Renovate-managed (Renovate ignores bench/corpus/**). `pins`: frozen benchmark-corpus capture pins — each entry pins a package@version that `make gen-bench-corpus` captures into bench/corpus/npm/<pkg>.full.json; the captures are committed, frozen data, refreshed only by a deliberate, manual re-capture (rerun the script and review the diff), never an automatic bump. The set is substantial, many-version packages spanning medium->heavy (trivial few-version packages stress nothing, so they are excluded). `smokeNames`: curated gnarly-version package names per ecosystem for the non-gating version-oracle smoke differential — only the names are pinned here, their version lists are fetched live (prereleases kept, since ordering is the point). See docs/architecture/performance.md.
